DP.074.0000:
The Oreburgh Mine is operated
with the utmost care.\f
We avoid causing any damage to
the natural habitats of Pokémon.
DP.074.0001:
Wow... Your Pokémon’s eyes are
twinkling brightly!\f
Seeing that makes me happy!
Here, I want you to have this!\f
DP.074.0002:
You know how Pokémon stay inside
their Poké Balls?\f
I try to think about what would be
the best Poké Balls for them.
DP.074.0004:
The whole system of taking the coal
out of the mine is automated.\f
There’s nothing backbreaking about
it!
